antithesis_summary: Use full-window attention throughout because long-range coverage matters more than extra step count.
label: Locality vs global context
thesis_summary: Preserve the mostly short-window pattern because it buys throughput while keeping some global context alive.
why_active: WINDOW_PATTERN='SSSL' already assumes mostly local attention with periodic full-context refresh, but that may be too lossy for 2048-token sequences.
